use_cases: Serving as a trigger for dropdown menus or select components
Providing styled action buttons with multiple visual variants
Enabling dropdown selection with open/closed state handling
Supporting form submissions with disabled states
ai_summary: A button component with multiple style variants (primary, mono, destructive, outline, ghost, etc.) designed to serve as a trigger for dropdown or select menus. Features chevron icon support for indicating expandable state and uses CVA for variant management. Includes skeuomorphic styling with hover effects and state-based styling.
